title: Geometry, Scale, Similarity, and Spatial Planning
description: Create a scale plan for an accessible room layout with paths, clearances, paint, and flooring. Learners cumulatively produce an accessible scale floor plan through theory, guided work, debugging, transfer, retrieval, and assessment.
objectives: Classify angles and two- and three-dimensional shapes by defining properties rather than appearance.
Choose and justify perimeter or area models for borders, surfaces, and composite regions.
Choose volume or surface-area models for capacity, covering, and packaging tasks.
